findings.regime_reasoning: 1h shows overbought RSI(86.02) while 1d shows oversold RSI(34.17), with price at $77,532 above both 1d moving averages but below 4h EMA200($79,394), indicating consolidation in an uptrend with short-term mean reversion pressure.
findings.ema_context: On 1h: price $77,532 above EMA50($76,838) and EMA200($77,016), showing strength. On 4h: price below EMA200($79,394) but above EMA50($77,288), indicating near-term weakness. On 1d: price above both EMA50($76,554) and EMA200($71,824), confirming longer-term uptrend.
findings.atr_context: 1h ATR is $382.8 (0.49% of price) indicating low volatility; 4h ATR is $790.04 (1.02%) showing moderate volatility; 1d ATR is $1,994.14 (2.57%) reflecting daily swings. Current position sizing should reflect 4h volatility (~1%) as the operational timeframe.
findings.top_ta_signal: 1h shows extreme overbought RSI(86.02) with price $77,532 at the upper end of recent range, while 4h RSI(65.97) remains neutral and 1d RSI(34.17) is oversold—this divergence suggests imminent short-term pullback toward $76,554 support before continuation of longer-term uptrend.
findings.opposing_signals: Daily regime remains bullish with price $5,708 above EMA200, and all three timeframes show price above their respective 50-period moving averages; however, 4h price below EMA200($79,394) and extreme 1h RSI create near-term headwinds for continuation.
